'''''Champions of the Force''''' was the fifth set of [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s [[Star Wars Miniatures]] game. It was released on June 6, 2006. Before its release it was often announced as the set containing the most [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]] ever (25, beating [[Clone Strike (Star Wars Miniatures)|Clone Strike's]] record of 22). The set includes figures from all eras and also introduces two new factions, [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]] and [[Sith/Legends|Sith]]. The [[Yuuzhan Vong]] are not included in this set. The box artwork is by [[Chris Trevas]].

==Contents==
{{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Champions of the Force (Star Wars Miniatures)}}

==Continuity==
The Old Republic Trooper and Sith Trooper miniatures use the [[DC-15]] as their weapons, despite the weapon being invented much later in the ''Star Wars'' timeline.<ref name="Sith Trooper miniature">{{Rebelscum|url=photo.asp?image=/SWmini/SWminiCOTF17sithtroopls.jpg|text=Sith Trooper miniature}}</ref><ref name="Sith Trooper miniature card">{{Rebelscum|url=photo.asp?image=/SWmini/SWminiCOTF17sithtroopcardbk.jpg|text=Sith Trooper card}}</ref>
